graded_findings.rationale: The gather evidence says this spec was updated appropriately and describes the new validate_config command behavior. This item does not identify an adherence gap.
The gather evidence says this plan was updated appropriately and maps implementation and tests to the spec. This item does not identify an adherence gap.

The gather evidence identifies a published dscli command reference and multi-node workflow that should document the new validate_config command but was not changed. That is a substantive documentation gap for a user-facing CLI addition.
